creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Also take a note, that in case of NO_BITMAPS usage (which added to OPTIONS_DEFAULT as default option), the fc-list program (or with using fontconfig library) may not list *.pcf fonts in this case, e.g. installed by x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-100dpi (x11-fonts/font-adobe-100dpi, x11-fonts/font-bh-100dpi, x11-fonts/font-bitstream-100dpi, etc.), x11-fonts/xorg-fonts-75dpi (x11-fonts/font-adobe-75dpi, x11-fonts/font-bh-75dpi, x11-fonts/font-bitstream-75dpi, etc.), x11-fonts/terminus-font, etc.
Possible, that there are users of such ports, which may need to rebuild x11-fonts/fontconfing port with disabled NO_BITMAPS option or somehow override such new configuration.
